name: DataLineageTracker

neutralConcepts: Lineage records are IMMUTABLE — append-only, never update or delete
All lineage records must include tenantId
Cross-flow lineage must explicitly identify the source flow by flowId

ironRules.rule: Lineage records are IMMUTABLE — append-only. Never update or delete an existing lineage record. Mutating lineage breaks audit integrity.
All lineage records must include tenantId. Lineage records without tenantId are rejected.
Cross-flow lineage records must explicitly identify the source flow by flowId. Implicit or missing source flow identification is a BUILD_FAILURE.

keywords: data lineage tracker immutable append-only tenantId cross-flow source flow identification warehouse analytics audit
